exercises.audioScript: There was a delay in the supply chain.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: India exports clothes to other countries.
The demand for the product has increased.
The machine runs day and night.
There was a delay in the supply chain.
exercises.answer: There was a delay in the supply chain.

exercises.audioScript: The company is setting up a new plant.
exercises.hindiScript: कंपनी नए संयंत्र लगा रही है।

options: The manufacturing process is complex.
New technology was installed in the factory.
Workers work hard.
The company is setting up a new plant.
exercises.answer: The company is setting up a new plant.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Quality control is necessary.

Workers need safety equipment.

exercises.hindiScript: यह उद्योग रोजगार पैदा करता है।

options: There was a delay in the supply chain.

exercises.audioScript: The demand for the product has increased.

dictationPassage.text: There was a delay in the supply chain. The company is setting up a new plant. Workers need safety equipment. This industry creates employment. The demand for the product has increased.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: आपूर्ति श्रृंखला में देरी हुई। कंपनी नए संयंत्र लगा रही है। श्रमिकों को सुरक्षा उपकरण चाहिए। यह उद्योग रोजगार पैदा करता है। उत्पाद की मांग बढ़ी है।
